bankroll.bust_threshold_tooltip: Minimum remaining balance to continue playing
bankroll.title: Bankroll parameters

cashout.interval_tooltip: Number of hands between cashouts (multiple of 100)
cashout.title: Cashout parameters

probability.at_limit_tooltip: End the simulation at this limit or higher
probability.reach_bankroll_tooltip: The bankroll will reach the specified amount or higher by the end of the simulation. Bankroll = Starting bankroll + Profit - Cashouts
probability.reach_profit_tooltip: The total profit will reach or exceed the specified amount by the end of the simulation. Total profit = Profit + Cashouts - Starting bankroll
probability.title: Probabilities

results.empty: Fill in the parameters and click "Run"
results.title: Results

validate.bankroll_gt_bust: Starting bankroll must be greater than bust threshold
validate.bankroll_positive: Starting bankroll must be greater than 0
validate.cashout_amount: Cashout amount must be greater than 0
validate.cashout_interval: Cashout interval must be greater than 0
validate.cashout_percentage: Cashout percentage must be between 1 and 100
validate.probability_limit: Select a limit for the probability query
validate.probability_target: Probability target must be greater than 0
